findings: Workers are tied to tmux/session lifetime via pane-leaf PID tracking; no detach:true persistence path for worker processes.
Teardown kills session-scoped worker PIDs then kills tmux session, consistent with attached-lifecycle model.
README detach guidance refers to tmux detach (session continues), not process detachment beyond session-managed runtime.
Implementation and docs align on teardown intent, but no explicit orphan-verification/escalation after SIGTERM.
